subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Lord! This servant of Thine, Mulla Ali Baba Saghir, was exalted in his servitude unto Thee and great in his worship of Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب ان عبدک هذا ملا علی بابا الصغیر کان جلیلا فی عبودیتک و کبیرا فی عبادتک
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
